guide_theme.intro: Learn the ForcedSkin theme JSON schema and palette field rules‚Äîdesign palettes for any site and submit them for the community.
guide_theme.quick_1_intro: Decide whether the theme runs in
guide_theme.quick_2_body: Follow the field specification below ‚Äî at minimum all required keys must be present in your JSON.
guide_theme.quick_3_after: page click ‚ÄúSubmit Theme‚Äù. Admins approve before it appears for everyone.
guide_theme.fields_intro: All palette entries must be hex (#RRGGBB) strings or CSS rgba(...) values.
guide_theme.scale_intro_sentence: The JSON keys primary, secondary, and accent each accept either authoring style below:
guide_theme.scale_compact_note: The engine promotes shade 500 as the default hue; 600/700 cover hover/active affordances.
guide_theme.scale_full_note: Publishing the complete ramp yields smoother tonal transitions everywhere.
guide_theme.scale_tip_body: Shade IDs follow Tailwind-style ramps: 50 is lightest, 950 is darkest. Light themes mainly use 500/600/700; dark themes often lean on 400/500/600.
guide_theme.vars_body_before: If default tokens fall short, add extra CSS vars under a
guide_theme.name_rule_1: Only lowercase ASCII letters, digits, and hyphen (
guide_theme.name_rule_fmt: Prefer concise ‚Äúmode-style‚Äù pairs such as ‚Äúdark-ocean‚Äù or ‚Äúlight-sakura‚Äù.
guide_theme.name_rule_3: Slugs must be globally unique‚Äîthey cannot change after publishing, so double-check beforehand.
guide_theme.review_2: ‚è≥ Submissions queue for review‚Äîstaff typically respond within 1‚Äì3 working days.
guide_theme.review_3: ‚úÖ Approved themes appear in the marketplace for everyone to favourite.
guide_theme.review_4: ‚ùå Invalid colours, conflicting names, or policy breaches will be rejected‚Äîdelete and submit a corrected version.
guide_theme.review_5: üö´ No malicious code, hate content, or obviously infringing palettes.
guide_theme.cta_intro: Ready? Head to the theme marketplace and publish your palette.

background.desc: Primary page background‚Äîlight themes lean near white, dark themes near deep neutrals. CSS var: --color-background

foreground.desc: Primary text‚Äîreadably contrasted against background. CSS var: --color-foreground

surface.desc: Card/panel/container fill‚Äîslightly lifted from background. CSS var: --color-surface

surfaceMuted.desc: Muted hovers/sub-containers stepped from surface. CSS var: --color-surface-muted

border.desc: Hairlines & dividers‚Äîtypically low saturation greys/semi-transparent tones. CSS var: --color-border

primary.desc: Primary brand ramp for buttons/links/focus‚Äîcan be single colour or ramp (50‚Äì950). Requires at least shades 500/600/700. Maps to CSS variables --color-primary- plus shade tokens (50‚Äì950)

secondary.desc: Secondary accent ramps for chips/ghost buttons‚Äîstructure matches primary‚Äîmaps to --color-secondary- plus shade tokens

accent.desc: Highlights, badges, spotlight colours‚Äîstructure matches primary‚Äîmaps to --color-accent- plus shade tokens

vars.desc: Arbitrary CSS custom properties‚Äîkeys omit ‚Äú--‚Äù; values applied verbatim on :root

guide_adapter.lead_4: ) describing which hostnames to target and which selector layers to tint. The server stores JSON only; the extension ships a
guide_adapter.lead_6: that applies paint rules‚Äînever arbitrary JavaScript.
guide_adapter.how_s1: The core engine starts with CSS-variable + inline overlays for baseline recolouring.
guide_adapter.how_s2: When a hostname hits, adapters run ascending by priority‚Äîthe smaller the number, the sooner the interpreter executes (recommended site adapters use 100).
guide_adapter.how_s3: Each adapter tweaks targeted nodes via the exposed engineApi helpers; skip transparent overlays/player stacks per the Best practices notes.
guide_adapter.how_s4: The runtime already observes DOM deltas and reapplies adapters throttled‚Äîyou do not need MutationObserver boilerplate.
guide_adapter.how_s5_suffix: ; every record‚Äôs JSON blob is cached locally. Updating the portal copy takes effect once users refresh adapters or reopen the browser‚Äîno reinstall required.
guide_adapter.formula_intro: Submitted JSON must pass server validation‚Äîthe root schema looks like this:
guide_adapter.layer_intro: Think semantically‚Äînot just by element names. See the checked-in sample
guide_adapter.note_avoid_body: The engine already ignores media, canvas, iframe, heavy blend/backdrop layers, and nodes whose classes hint at masks or overlays‚Äîextend those guardrails for translucent player chrome.
guide_adapter.note_iso_after: so their descendants skip global repainting.
guide_adapter.bp_ok_json_body: Invalid schema/layers/host rules bounce during review‚Äîfold this guide‚Äôs minimal sample & seeds before submitting.
guide_adapter.bp_skip_body: Matches core engine safeguards so translucent HUDs/video stacks are not flattened to solid fills.
guide_adapter.bp_nojs_body: The code field is JSON only; the extension no longer evals strings through new Function.
guide_adapter.submit_1: üîê Sign in before filing a submission.
guide_adapter.submit_2: üìã Provide display name, comma-separated domains, and paste the JSON into the adapter code textarea.
guide_adapter.submit_3: ‚è≥ Entries land in pending until staff validate safety + selector scope.
guide_adapter.submit_4: ‚úÖ Approved adapters roll out to every extension user who syncs adapters.
guide_adapter.submit_5: ‚ùå Overly broad selectors or invalid JSON return feedback‚Äîfix and resubmit.
guide_adapter.domain_intro: siteDomain is the human-facing list; matching actually keys off match.hostname like:
guide_adapter.cta_intro: Ready? Open the adapter gallery and submit your JSON.

formula.id_desc: Logical adapter id‚Äîusually the site codename, e.g. bilibili
formula.priority_desc: Execution order (ascending). Site-specific adapters typically use 100
formula.match_desc: Array of hostname rule objects (see table below)
formula.layers_desc: Ordered paint layers‚Äî kinds documented in the layer table

host.suffix_desc: Hostname equals value or ends with .value (covers both example.com and *.example.com)

palette.primary500: Primary emphasis (links) mapped from theme primary.500
palette.primary700: Deeper primary state mapped from primary.700 or 800

layer.richText_use: Sites that expose branded web components
layer.richText_map: Emit required CSS variables + textual colour mapping
layer.svgRecolor_map: Default fill/stroke‚ÜícurrentColor; optional fill/stroke palette keys for fixed colour
layer.svgRecolor_mark: Optional marking to avoid interfering with cleanup
